title: Black Cats show their claws to Fast Eleven
description: FOOTBALL NEWS - The Lawaaikamp side Black...
bodyText:
FOOTBALL NEWS - The Lawaaikamp side Black Cats FC defeated Fast Eleven with a score of 5-2 in a regional league game on Saturday afternoon at the Lawaaikamp Stadium.


> Nkosiyabo Toto (hat trick) and Lihle Toto (brace) scored for Black Cats, while Anele Ntloko and Zefanias Mabunda netted the two goals for Fast Eleven.


So far, Cats have played nine games with six victories, one draw and one defeat, sitting with 19 points in the second position on the log. Meanwhile Fast Eleven is in the bottom half of the regional league log table.

Nkosiyabo Toto netted the first two goals, to which Lihle Toto added one to make it 3-0. Fast Eleven put in everything they had and Anele Ntluko managed their first goal, making it 3-1.

Nkosiyabo Toto scored the fourth goal for Black Cats, followed by Mabunda's goal for Fast Eleven to make it 4-2. Black Cats didn't slow down and put the final nail in Fast Eleven's coffin courtesy of Lihle Toto.

Weekend results

FC Benfica 4-0 FC Rebels

Sea Birds 1-1 La Liga

Red Eagles 1-7 FC United

Simunye 3-1 Kabo Yellow

Black Cats 5-2 Fast Eleven

Bitou Young Pirates 1-2 Voota

NMU Madibaz 3-2 Moonlight

Simunye 2-1 La Liga

Voota 3-1 Red Eagles

Peace Makers 5-1 FC Rebels

Black Cats 1-1 Moonlight

Benfica 2-3 Smuts United

Bitou Young Pirates 1-0 FC United

NMU Madibaz 1-3 Fast Eleven

Sea Birds 2-2 Kabo Yellow

Peace Makers 1-2 Smuts United

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
